title: Screen Translator Internal Inventory
description: Internal inventory of Screen Translator. Lists each visual unit detected in the legacy system, with stable identity and traceability back to source code. Saved to _reversa_sdd/screens/inventory.json. Overwritten on each run.

sourcePlatform.description: Slug of the detected source platform (e.g. cobol-ansi-tui, delphi-vcl, asp-classic, android-xml, ios-xib).

screens.description: List of screens detected in the legacy system.

id.description: Unique and stable identifier within this inventory (e.g. SCR-0001).

canonicalName.description: Canonical screen name used in target_screens.md.

file.description: Relative path of the legacy file.

line.description: Line in the file, when applicable.

paragraph.description: Name of the COBOL paragraph, Delphi/VB6 form, Android Activity, etc.

kind.description: Structural type of the screen. Use 'raw' when the adapter does not cover the type.

isCritical.description: Marks critical vs auxiliary screens (fed by reversa-detective when available). In hybrid mode, critical screens tend to go to literal mode.

matchesUiInventory.description: true se a tela aparece em _reversa_sdd/ui/inventory.md.

transitions.description: Next screens or events triggered from this one.

i18n.description: When the screen has an external string catalog.

skipped.description: When the legacy system has no UI, this field is filled and screens[] is empty.

divergenceFromUiInventory.description: Comparison against _reversa_sdd/ui/inventory.md. If divergencePercent > 10, the agent stops and asks for review (RF-05).
